release_summary: Chain accumulator strategic gates. Four hard rules layered onto v2.3.1's chain accumulators that block credit when it'd be positionally redundant. (1) Same-position same-team duplicates: QB-QB / RB-RB / TE-TE same team blocked; WR-WR same team allowed up to 2 (3-WR-starter logic). (2) First bring-back only: if user has any mate on candidate's team, opposing-team chain blocked. (3) Stack-QB gate: if candidate is QB and user has QB+PC same-team stack, bring-back QB chain blocked. (4) Stack-TE gate: if candidate is TE and user has TE+QB same-team stack, bring-back TE chain blocked. Triggered by Woody Marks recommended #1 at Chris R13 P147 (4 RBs already, Marks completes RB-RB same-team chain with Monty). Verified: Marks falls to #2 (Antonio Williams now #1). Wan'Dale R10 P112 flip preserved (chain credit unchanged in that case). Aaron Jones R10 P112 stays #2. Hunter still buried. Net knob delta: 0. Pure strategic rules — no sweep needed.
